item.title: Have some idiots.
item.description:
I ain’t fall asleep—I don’t ever sleep! You can come to my house right now; ion even blink—on my faRRa, on my moRRa—you go(?)—ion know what ya talmbout, mayne; I’m gangsta!
Amen
*goofy yelp*
Jezus take the wheel. "I got you, fam"
The average Belgian road.
Can' park there mate.
Belgium
Belgium again
That is going to be expensive.
I know... I know. I hate the overlays too.

item.title: Phone Clearing Dump (Mostly Gaming MEMES)
item.description:
1. She went to bard's college and is ashamed of it? She doesn't like magic?!
2. WTF?!
3
4. Somewhere out there some dev spent two years of their life tirelessly working on game, for it to just in on your backlog, while you to play Animal Crossing for the 1000th time
5. Give us that Paris streets CCTV
6
7. I wish I had a copy of OOunga-Bunga 24 (20 2024 B.C. that is)
8. How do we know they are not NPCs
9. Wish we could bring back all of these!
10. You ruined gaming!
11
12. Why Netflix, why?!?!?
13
14. Dang it! Just let me have fun!
15. Hello friendos, for the past year and a half, I’ve been working on a game that’s very close to my heart. "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)" is a quirky adventure crafted with love and passion, with my brother by my side, helping every step of the way. As indie developers, we rely on your support to bring our game to life. By adding it to your wishlist, you’re helping us reach more players and make a big impact in the gaming community. https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Here is a funny sign from the game (and helpful life advice)
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Thoughts in the shower
item.description: "Lemme see .. I need to pick up that suit from the dry cleaners before my meeting on Monday. And I think I'm gonna start that compost pile this weekend. What else .. what else?" I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk at some point today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Red Flags - Cosplay
item.description:
Here are some of my side by side recreations of character frames from the “Red Flags” music video by the hilarious Tom Cardy - amazing art by GalooGameLady. It was so much fun becoming the Red Flags Woman this year :D
If you don't have context on the music video... This frame is even better :D
Get the vid stuck in your head the rest of the day here - it still kicks into my brain every other day: https://youtube.com/watch?v=GFokXnCCMf8
This was my favorite frame to recreate :D
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Even the guy have colored blond hair.
item.dc:creator: Pentjotal

item.title: Right In Our Neighborhoods ... “A Well-Trained Wife: My Escape From Christian Patriarchy" - author Tia Levings
item.description: When Tia Levings married at 19 years old, she achieved what her Baptist church had endorsed as her life’s highest calling: becoming a Christian wife. But as her husband embraced the teachings of the Christian patriarchy movement, she became governed by a list of rules she hadn’t bargained for. Her husband controlled her clothing, censored her reading list, demanded to be called “my lord” and subjected her to “physical discipline” — all in the name of Christ. Levings insists the Christian teachings that enabled this abuse weren’t fringe. Rather, she writes in her forthcoming memoir, these beliefs have been normalized in a host of evangelical circles — and now, more pressingly, they are infecting the nation’s political landscape. “You can just look at the family model and what those rules and regulations are, and then apply them to the wider scale, because that is exactly what they’re doing,” Levings told Religion News Service. “They use that same model in their churches, they use them in their small governments, and they’ll use them in the national government.” What lessons might your story have for readers in this political moment? Patriarchy cannot continue without the support of women. We have much more power than we realize. It’s important to notice that the conversations we’re having around candidate Vice President Kamala Harris involve her fertility, her motherhood, her childbearing. They’re also attacking the sound of her laugh, which relates to the “fundy-baby voice” and vocal modulation in fundamentalism. They are attacking her race and her career. These elements point to patriarchy. I think in Republican politics, it’s important to remember that the depth of the strategy is 50 years long. The organizations behind Project 2025 have a strategy they have been building in evangelical patriarchy for generations. So it’s not just about former President Donald Trump. https://religionnews.com/2024/07/24/a-well-trained-wife-unpacks-life-in-christian-patriarchy/
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Images of Note: I just wanna live

E looks like a fucking good time.
The nukes get renamed to "Miku Miku Beams"
If you know you know
same with period pain, take your meds
this, this is my sense of humor.
Scottish people when there's a formal event or sports match.
* Depressed * Forced to face horrors they can barely comprehend * Forced into a destiny they never wanted to have Yup. Lain is just female Shinji.
TAKE DRUGS, USE LINUX
mood
blob
Two stupid dogs was a fucking trip

item.title: Return of the meme: 1084 (thorny bramble)
item.description:
It's morning again, and I am alive to unleash new terrors. Let's get this bread.
Shit man, this sounds like a good time.
I'd love to play with this yeast.
That Eastern Roman life.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "PIPPIN! Pippin? Pippin? You're a good boy."

item.title: In the newly-formed parliament in France, the youngest member, far-right MP Flavien Termet, was given the task of welcoming the deputies. Most of the deputies did not shake his hand.

item.description:
How my wife thinks I look at other women
Look at that, kids having fun, not a phone in sight
Wee wee
Call felix
Then you can't find it because it's on your back
Cursed book shop finds. OC
Cursed book shop finds. OC
Cats too
I see nothing....
Yes
It's a trap
Follow me for more recipe ideas
Oh the shame
Slams it into reverse
Free bird intensifies
Our clothes comrade
Cat tax. Edit - Wooh thanks everyone. Just found out stonetoss is a fucking nazi. Don't share his shit. If anything, it's worth finding out so we all can spread the word.I've deleted it. Punch a nazi.
